title: Runbook
description: Ordered sequence of ActionType steps with an optional on-failure branch. Design contract: docs/roadmap/sre-agent-scope.md § 3.4. Minimum viable scope in P1: linear sequence + one `on_failure` branch id (a full DAG is deferred until two callers need it).

id.description: Step id unique within the runbook. Referenced by `on_failure` on another step.

action_type.description: Fully-qualified ActionType name from the ontology (e.g. `ops.restart-service`).

on_failure.description: Step id to run when this step fails. When set, the failing step still audits + the on_failure step runs; then the runner short-circuits. When null, a failing step short-circuits without a fallback.
